name: Smoke and Shadows

abilities.name: Into Shadow
abilities.text: Once per activation. After this model ends a move in base contact with a Shadow marker, it may place in base contact with any Shadow marker within 6" of that Shadow marker. Then, remove a Shadow marker in base contact.

actions.name: Smokebomb
actions.effects: Make a Shadow marker within range. Enemies within (m)2" of the marker must pass a TN 10 Wp duel or gain a Stunned token.

triggers.name: Out of Sight
triggers.text: Allies within range of the (m) may move up to 3".

triggers.name: Oyabun's Wisdom
triggers.text: allies within range of the (m) gain an Adaptable token.

extraction_notes: The Oyabun's Wisdom trigger uses a book icon which I've noted as '(book icon)' - this may represent a specific suit or symbol in the game system
The (m) symbol appears to reference the Shadow marker created by the Smokebomb action
